summary: Iteration 8 testing completed - ALL 3 NEW FEATURES VERIFIED: (1) Accessibility - HiddenDesc added to all 14 dialogs, no aria-describedby console warnings, (2) Mobile responsiveness - hamburger menu visible at 768px/375px, sidebars slide in/out with animation, overlay works, (3) Enhanced collaborator UI - search dropdown, role descriptions ('Can view but not edit', 'Can edit zones and prefabs'), empty state with Users icon. Desktop regression passed.

critical_code_review_comments: HiddenDesc component correctly wraps DialogDescription with sr-only class for screen readers
All 14 dialogs in Dialogs.jsx now have HiddenDesc for accessibility compliance
Mobile CSS breakpoints at 768px and 480px properly implemented in App.css
sidebar-left-wrapper and sidebar-right-wrapper use transform: translateX for slide animation
mobile-toggle-sidebar button uses display: none on desktop, display: flex at <=768px
mobile-overlay with visible class provides backdrop when sidebars are open
Collaborator search dropdown (collab-search-dropdown) positioned absolutely below input
Role descriptions (collab-role-desc) styled with smaller font and muted color
Empty state (collab-empty-state) uses Users icon from lucide-react

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 3 new features working, no accessibility warnings)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test worlds.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 testing completed successfully. THREE NEW FEATURES VERIFIED: (1) ACCESSIBILITY - HiddenDesc component added to all 14 dialogs in Dialogs.jsx, wrapping DialogDescription with sr-only class. No aria-describedby console warnings observed when opening any dialog. (2) MOBILE RESPONSIVENESS - CSS breakpoints at 768px and 480px in App.css. Hamburger menu (mobile-toggle-sidebar) visible on mobile, hidden on desktop. Sidebars use transform: translateX for slide-in animation. Mobile overlay provides backdrop. Header adapts (header-center hidden on mobile). (3) ENHANCED COLLABORATOR UI - Search dropdown appears when typing in collab-invite-input. Role selector shows descriptions ('Can view but not edit' for Viewer, 'Can edit zones and prefabs' for Editor). Empty state shows Users icon with helpful message. All desktop regression tests passed.

features_tested.accessibility_dialogdescription: HiddenDesc added to all 14 dialogs - no console warnings
features_tested.mobile_sidebar_slide: Sidebars slide in/out with transform animation
features_tested.mobile_dialog_sizing: Dialogs properly constrained on mobile viewport
features_tested.collab_role_descriptions: Viewer: 'Can view but not edit', Editor: 'Can edit zones and prefabs'
features_tested.collab_empty_state: Users icon with 'No collaborators yet' message
